title: Devil Ring of Flight
body:
⚠️ Development Status: Maintenance Mode 

Feature development for this mod has concluded with version 1.21.7 (Fabric) and 1.21.1 (Forge/NeoForge). 

As I focus on other projects (like DynamicEnchants), I will not be porting this mod to future versions of Minecraft. 

However, I am still maintaining all current and previous versions. If you encounter any bugs or issues in any released version of this mod, please report them, and I will release fixes as needed!

🪽 Ring of Flight 
Take to the skies with a powerful late-game bauble. 

📖 About the Mod 

This mod grants you the ability to craft a ring that provides Creative Flight when placed in a trinket/curio slot. It is designed as a late-game reward for players who want the freedom of flight without the bulk of a jetpack or the mechanics of an Elytra. 

💍 Crafting & Progression 

This is not an early-game item! You must prove your worth to obtain the power of flight.

*   The Progression: You will need to craft a Diamond Ring, upgrade it to a Bloody Ring, and finally craft the Devil's Ring.
*   The Cost: The final recipe requires an Elytra, ensuring this remains a balanced late-game item.

📥 Requirements & Dependencies Please ensure you have the correct dependencies for your Mod Loader: Fabric:

*   No Dependencies Required for version 0.0.9 and above.
*   (Note: Versions older than 0.0.9 require the Trinkets mod.) NeoForge: Requires a "Curios-like" mod to function properly in trinket slots. Confirmed working with:
*   Accessories (requires Curios Compat Layer)
*   Curios Continuation
*   Adorned Forge:
*   Requires Ohmega.

🤝 Community & Support Modpacks: ✅ YES! You can use this mod in your modpack. Feedback: Found a bug?

*   💬 Discord: Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Rcwdr7e) and leave a message in the mod's text channel.
